ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_professionals" (
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical professional */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the medical professional is based */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the medical professional */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the medical professional */,
  "board_certification" TEXT /* Board certification of the medical professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_prof_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_professionals_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_data" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of adoption */,
  "med_sch_yr" INTEGER /* Medical school year */,
  "meetings" INTEGER /* Number of meetings */,
  "jours" INTEGER /* Number of jours */,
  "free_time" INTEGER /* Amount of free time */,
  "discuss" INTEGER /* Whether the medical professional engages in discussions */,
  "clubs" INTEGER /* Number of clubs the medical professional is part of */,
  "friends" INTEGER /* Number of friends the medical professional has */,
  "community" INTEGER /* Community engagement score */,
  "patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients the medical professional has */,
  "proximity" INTEGER /* Proximity score */,
  "specialty" INTEGER /* Specialty adoption score */,
  "adoption_type" TEXT /* Type of adoption (e.g., technology, treatment, practice) */,
  "adoption_source" TEXT /* Source of adoption (e.g., conference, journal, colleague) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_data_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "sub_specialty" TEXT /* Sub-specialty (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_engagement" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community engagement record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "community_score" INTEGER /* Community engagement score */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., online, offline, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the medical professional */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the medical professional */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the medical professional */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the medical professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption pattern record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "adoption_pattern" TEXT /* Adoption pattern (e.g., early adopter, late adopter) */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., technology, treatment, practice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_patterns_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_characteristics" (
  "city_char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city characteristic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Characteristic of the city (e.g., population density, median income) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the characteristic (e.g., people per sq mi, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_characteristics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_schools" (
  "med_school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical school record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "med_school_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical school */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned (e.g., MD, DO, PhD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_schools_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximity_data" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proximity record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "proximity_score" INTEGER /* Proximity score */,
  "proximity_type" TEXT /* Type of proximity (e.g., distance, network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_data_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_date" TEXT /* Date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network record */,
  "med_prof_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_networks_med_prof_id FOREIGN KEY ("med_prof_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("med_prof_id")
)
